title: Harden adversarial findings: safer reset, secret SET unlock, root state-dir, schema lock
description: Harden adversarial findings: safer reset, secret SET unlock, root state-dir, schema lock
acceptance_criteria: Root --state-dir works before subcommand; reset --all is seed-only with --registered for full wipe; SecretStore.set unlocks existing envelope before rewrite; schema add/remove holds exclusive lock and re-reads; tests+smoke cover these; README updated.
